adapterBoundary.policy: Thin host adapters can be the product surface; keep them unless host registration proof says they are redundant.

gainHonesty.policy: Benchmark impact is not a current-repo savings claim without a matched baseline.

hardwareCalibration.policy: Hardware, sensors, clocks, and physical devices need calibration or tuning proof before simplification.

oneRunnableCheck.policy: Non-trivial new logic should leave one smallest runnable check; trivial one-liners do not need ceremony.

requestedExplanation.policy: Explicitly requested reports, walkthroughs, or phase notes are not clutter.

shortcutDebt.policy: Intentional lean shortcuts need a ceiling and upgrade trigger.

fixtureCandidate.sourceQuestion: Does precisionReview identify delete, simplify, keep, and proof-blocked decisions instead of dumping findings?

actionGroups.firstExperiment: Open the first marker line and prove one branch before splitting.
actionGroups.stopCondition: Stop if search or focused tests show the code is still active product behavior.
actionGroups.validationRoute: Run call-site search plus the focused behavior test before editing.

blockedByProof.action: Do not split the whole file first; start at the first marker line and prove one removable branch.
blockedByProof.proofRequired: Attach call-site evidence and a focused test.

deleteList.action: Inline or delete the wrapper if search proves it adds no policy, naming, compatibility, or test value.
deleteList.proofRequired: Use search results to confirm no public contract depends on it.

keepList.proofRequired: Require before/after tests for trust-boundary behavior.
keepList.reason: Treat this as a safety boundary.

simplifyFirst.action: Try URLSearchParams after an encoding equivalence test.
simplifyFirst.proofRequired: Add tests for repeated keys, empty values, and encoding.

topActions.action: Inline or delete the wrapper if search proves it adds no policy, naming, compatibility, or test value.
topActions.proofRequired: Use search results to confirm no public contract depends on it.

reportQualityQuestions: Does precisionReview identify delete, simplify, keep, and proof-blocked decisions instead of dumping findings?

scanScope.note: Synthetic fixture; no private source tree was scanned.

scopeBoundary.purpose: Synthetic public fixture for ShipGuard report-quality behavior.

leanDebtLedger.description: Intentional lean shortcuts found in comments. Every shortcut should name a ceiling and an upgrade trigger so deferrals stay reviewable.
